body:
## Summary
- Preserve keyboard focus reveal for provenance source notes while preventing first pointer clicks from being toggled closed by focus ordering.
- Extend the shared web aria-state spec to assert focus reveal plus Enter collapse/expand behavior.
- Update the UI-effects guard for the pointer-activation contract.

## Validation
- NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:ui-effects -- --test-name-pattern 'ProvenanceBadge|source note'
- npm run typecheck -- --pretty false
- CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2
- CI=1 E2E_PORT=4174 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/web-aria-false-state.spec.ts --workers=1
- CI=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/exam-submit-review.spec.ts --workers=1 -g 'provenance|source note|mock exam'
- git diff --check
title: Fix provenance badge pointer focus disclosure
